title: The University of Sydney AI Policy Crawl Report
summary: The University of Sydney staged artifacts cover official guidance on academic integrity, AI assistance, acknowledgment requirements, and the Semester 1 2025 assessment default for non-exam assessments. Claims are staged agent-reviewed candidates only and are not canonical public tracker claims.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
